PERSONALLY APPEARED before me, the undersigned authority in and for the said

a Mississippi limited liability company, and that for and on behalf of the said limited liability
company, and as its act and deed she executed the above and foregoing instrument, after first having
been duly authorized by said limited liability company so to do.

Comes Dogs
